rationale.R1.3: The agent flags at least one claim the evidence does not support, specifically the 50/50 evaluation ratio being misleading.
rationale.RX.1: The output presents results without uncertainty disclosure or confidence intervals.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions introduced.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced, but minor edits lack traceability.
